name.ja: <ruby>纏<rt>てん</rt></ruby><ruby>竜<rt>りゅう</rt></ruby><ruby>域<rt>いき</rt></ruby>の<ruby>戦<rt>せん</rt></ruby><ruby>利<rt>り</rt></ruby><ruby>品<rt>ひん</rt></ruby>

requirement.en: Send 1 Wyrm Type monster from your hand or 1 face-up Wyrm Type monster from your field to the Graveyard.

effect.en: Draw 1 card and show it. Then, if that card is a Wyrm Type monster, you can Special Summon 1 Level 7 or higher Wyrm Type monster from your hand face-up to your field.
